detectors.description: SUPRA.add_liq() (SUPRA.sol#829-863) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),_initialSupply * 35 / 100,0,0,_owner,block.timestamp) (SUPRA.sol#845-859)
